properties.name: Conrad Los Angeles
properties.description: Modern quarters with city views in a sleek hotel offering a tapas bar, a Spanish eatery & a pool.

properties.name: Freehand Los Angeles
properties.description: Trendy dorms & rooms in a funky lodging with dining & breakfast, plus a rooftop pool & bar.

properties.name: Level Los Angeles - Downtown South Olive
properties.description: High-end, modern 1- to 3-bedroom apartments with city views, plus a rooftop pool, a gym & a sauna.

properties.name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel Los Angeles Downtown
properties.description: Polished downtown hotel with a gastropub an airy lounge & a fitness center, plus event space.

properties.name: The Wayfarer Downtown LA, Tapestry Collection by Hilton
properties.description: Trendy hotel offering indoor & rooftop bars, plus a cafe, a guest kitchen & co-working space.

properties.name: The Live Hotel
properties.description: Classic lodging with casual rooms, a seasonal outdoor pool & meeting space, plus Wi-Fi.

properties.name: Kawada Hotel
properties.description: Casual rooms with kitchenettes, plus a buzzy bar serving light bites & weekend breakfast.

properties.name: Metro Plaza Hotel
properties.description: Basic rooms & suites, some with kitchens, in a budget hotel with a gym, plus free breakfast & Wi-Fi.
